positive: A complex, highly stylized symmetrical mandala pattern depicting an enchanted forest and celestial mechanics. The primary elements include bioluminescent glowing flora, intricate geometric patterns, crescent moons, and stylized animal silhouettes (e.g., foxes, owls) integrated seamlessly into the design. Use deep jewel tones—emerald green, sapphire blue, amethyst purple—accented with brilliant metallic gold foil details. The style should be a combination of neo-art nouveau and elegant tattoo flash illustration, featuring strong, clean linework, sharp contrasts, and a cohesive, repetitive feel suitable for a central apparel print. The composition must be perfectly balanced and visually rich, emphasizing negative space.
